---
title: "matrix.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/node/pennyone/matrix.test.ts"
loc: 29
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.20
style_score: 9.40
intel_score: 6.92
overall_score: 7.27
---

## Intent
Calculates structural logic density using CC and nesting metrics.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [calculateLogicScore](file://../../../src/core/calculus/logic.js)
- [calculateStyleScore](file://../../../src/core/calculus/style.js)
- [calculateIntelScore](file://../../../src/core/calculus/intel.js)

### Exports
- `simple`
- `complex`
- `goodCode`
- `badCode`
- `opaqueCode`
- `lowScore`
- `transparentCode`
- `highScore`
